reason: Apple CPU artifact runs through Accelerate cblas_sgemm + multi-op chain.
Apple CPU value-call (tessera_apple.cpu.call) dispatches to the named Accelerate/LAPACK C ABI symbol.
Apple GPU artifact runs through MPS / MSL / MPSGraph per the runtime envelope.
Apple GPU value-call (tessera_apple.gpu.kernel_call) dispatches named C ABI symbols for strict rank-3 batched matmul, native sparse attention, PPO policy-loss, and EBM value envelopes.
CPU JIT artifact runs through the numpy reference path.
CPU artifact runs through the x86 AMX / native CPU runtime.

ROCm matmul artifact runs the COMPILER-GENERATED RDNA WMMA GEMM (Stage L): tessera-opt generates + serializes the kernel to hsaco in-process (no mlir-opt), then HIP loads + launches it. Opt-in; the hand-written rocm_wmma lane stays the default + oracle.
ROCm matmul artifact runs a real RDNA WMMA matrix-core GEMM on the AMD GPU via the shipped tessera_rocm_wmma_gemm_{f16,bf16} C ABI symbol (HIPRTC-compiled for the device arch).
